Welcome to our Sunnyvale project, we are doing reconstruction. I think it's gonna be really interesting for you. Enjoy the video!
This two-minute video-mix about interior designer day in Silicon Valley. I really like this video fragments of Work process, the job site, interesting moments, before and after.
Tv interview for Channel 9, Israel. It was such a great experience! Talking about design, architecture, new year and small tips for decorating your home sweet home.
This is really interesting interview
with @ anastasiya.filimonova.
I told about opened interior design studio in Silicon Valley and features work in California.
Thank you my friends for making it happen! We made a great charity design seminar together. I'm so happy to be able to share my experience and knowledge and with at the same time to help kids. Charity is an amazing thing for our community!

House in Belmont Remodel

  • Hello and Welcome to our Belmont project, we are doing reconstruction. I think it's gonna be really interesting for you. Enjoy the video!

House in Walnut Creek Remodel

Welcome to our project Walnut Creek. I'm so happy to show you this space. Totally finished, after all the hard work we've done here.
Clients review.
“Hi this is my home. I bought it 5 years ago. And we want to do completely remodeling, to make it more up to time.
Alexandra like professional was great in work. She is very talented. "
I created this interior in very calm palette, very funcltional and at the same time very inviting and relaxing. This is the atmosphere that I felt in this house from the first initial consultation, and we kept it through all the process of remodeling.
The simplest things are often the truest.
It`s a good way to use minimalistic design, pure lines, fresh colours.
So it's good field to playing with expressive decoration.
For a fantasy mood and new inspiration.

House in Livermore Remodel

This top-to-bottom remodel has been one of our quickest turnarounds, but the results are beautiful, thoughtful, and a great reflection of our client’s personal taste. Enjoy watching!
"When we saw this house in the first time it was very old style. We was needed a designer and someone recommended Alexandra. And which was the great recommendation we get."
"We shape our homes and then our homes shape us."

It's a very special videos,

showing me the working process from the beginning to the end result of creating the dream house for our amazing family.
I fell in love with this house from the first moment.
Just added some new spaces, architecture, warm wooden textures, style light accents, comfortable furniture... So the details are not the details. They make the design.
Every great design begins with an even better story.
This project started from initial consultation, that I make sometimes even before clients decide to buy a house. So, after purchase, and just 4 month of hard work we nailed this top to bottom remodel!
Every minute of working process we focus on making the best of the best for our clients, going through each small detail.
And then it all comes together!
It is really inspiring me to be involved into all stages of design process. First ideas, sketches, construction, showrooms and final final staging and styling. To see those ideas coming to life to every small detail.
Enjoy the video!

alexandra@alexandradiz.com
